page_content:
Prerequisite: GEMS100, GEMS102, and GEMS104.

Corequisite: GEMS296.

Restriction: Must be in the Gemstone program; and sophomore standing or higher.

GEMS208 Special Topics in Leadership and Team Development (1-3 Credits)

Principles, methods and types of leadership and team development with an emphasis on group discussion and decision making. Reading, discussion and exploration of the basic team concept, communications for winning scenarios, goal setting, problem solving, conflict resolution and research methods.

Restriction: Must be in the Gemstone program.
